topics.summary: With less than 20 days until the June 3 nationwide local elections, candidates officially registered on May 14. DPK holds a commanding lead in party support (45–50% vs. PPP's 18–23%), though the gap has narrowed by roughly 4 percentage points over four weeks. Key battleground races include Daegu mayor (DPK's Kim Bu-gyeom 44% vs. PPP's Choo Kyung-ho 41%), Busan, and South Gyeongnam.

evidence_headlines.title: 대구 김부겸 44% vs 추경호 41%…한 달 전 17%p 격차서 3%p 차로 좁혀져
김부겸 '외연 확장' vs 추경호 '정권 심판'…대구시장 선거 본격 개막
느릿느릿 '2주새 3%P' 좁혀진 지지율 격차… 국힘 '애간장' 민주 '긴장'

topics.topic_en: Lee's Prosecution Cancellation Special Counsel Bill
topics.summary: The DPK tabled the '조작기소 의혹 특검법' in late April, a bill critics say would effectively allow a new special prosecutor to drop the ongoing criminal charges against President Lee Jae-myung himself. The PPP named its entire local election campaign committee after opposing the bill, while the legal community widely condemned the measure as unconstitutional.

evidence_headlines.title: '이 대통령 공소취소' 특검 논란…법조계 '당연히 위헌·위법'
국힘 '與 공소취소 특검, 국민 배신이자 날강도 짓…표로 심판해야'
[6·3 지선] 국민의힘, '공소취소 저지 선대위' 출범…'李 독재·폭주 심판'

topics.summary: The court has scheduled Yoon Suk-yeol's insurrection verdict for May 28, just days before the local elections. Yoon was already sentenced to 7 years in April at the appellate level for obstructing his own arrest, and the special prosecutor has filed additional charges. The PPP has officially refused to take any leadership-level position on the expected verdict.

evidence_headlines.title: 윤석열 내란 재판/전개 – 선고기일 2026년 5월 28일
2026년 5월 윤석열 체포방해 항소심 결과·형량·판단 근거 3가지
국민의힘 원내대변인 논평 '선고 결과 앞으로의 재판 진행에 관해 지도부가 낼 입장은 없다'

topics.summary: The DPK and six other parties had pushed to hold a constitutional amendment referendum simultaneously with the June 3 local elections, but the PPP boycotted the National Assembly vote on May 8, causing the effort to fail. Polls showed 59% of the public supported holding the referendum alongside the local elections, making the PPP's obstruction a campaign liability.

evidence_headlines.title: 혹시나 했는데 역시나…6·3 지방선거 동시 개헌 국민투표 무산 여파는?
87년 체제 종식 헌법 개정안 국민의힘 보이콧에 '무산'
개헌안 국민투표 지방선거와 동시 실시 찬성 59%…반대 27% [NBS]

topics.summary: On May 15, the special prosecutor demanded a 7-year-6-month prison sentence for former first lady Kim Keon-hee on charges including abuse of power and nepotism ('매관매직'). The trial continues as the special counsel team shifts from investigation to prosecution-support mode following completion of its main inquiry.

evidence_headlines.title: 특검, '매관매직' 김건희에 징역 7년 6개월 구형
수사 마친 김건희 특검, 반 년간 68억 더 쓴다

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Approval Hits New High
topics.summary: Multiple polls in the week of May 13–17 show President Lee Jae-myung's approval at 65–67%, with one Realmeter survey recording a post-inauguration high of 65.5%. Analysts attribute the rise to energy-security achievements and a recovering KOSPI. DPK party support reached 50.5% while PPP sat at 23% or below depending on the pollster.

evidence_headlines.title: 이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고‥민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%
[정치] 이 대통령 지지율 67%...민주 46%·국민의힘 18% [NBS]
이재명 대통령 지지율 67%…민주당 2%p↓·국민의힘 3%p↑

topics.topic_en: Housing Policy and Capital Gains Tax Revival
topics.topic_ko: 다주택자 양도세 중과 부활 및 부동산 논란
topics.summary: The government's deferral of the capital gains surcharge on multi-home owners expired on May 9, reinstating a maximum effective tax rate of up to 82.5%. The PPP and critics warn of market distortions, while the Lee administration couples the measure with a 135-million-unit supply plan and the '5극 3특' regional rebalancing initiative aimed at reducing Seoul-centric demand.

evidence_headlines.title: [창간특집] 2026 부동산 대진단 – 다주택자 양도세 중과 유예 종료 초읽기
이재명 정부 부동산 정책 분석: 장특공제 폐지 파장과 2026 전망
보유세 인상·장특공제 폐지 등 이재명식 부동산 정책 비판

topics.topic_en: US Defense Cost Demands and Korea-US-China Diplomacy
topics.topic_ko: 미국 방위비 증액 압박 및 한미중 외교
topics.summary: Washington has pressed Seoul for a roughly 50% increase in defense spending and a near-doubling of the troop-stationing cost-sharing payment, framing demands in part around deterring China. The Lee government is pursuing 'strategic autonomy,' having also agreed to a $330-billion support package for the US; progressive parties have criticized the deal as capitulation.

evidence_headlines.title: 韓국방비 50% 증액···美청구서 나왔다
팩트시트, 트럼프가 그린 한국의 대미 종속 로드맵
2026년 5월 13일 오늘의 주요 뉴스 – 반도체 수출 43.7% 급증과 미중 경제 외교

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
